display_text: Morbid Mask, Cost: 900: Provides a passive 18% Lifesteal effect. Heals the attacker for a percentage of the physical damage they deal with each attack. A core component for sustain-focused builds and a stepping stone to more powerful Lifesteal items. Stats: Lifesteal: 18%.
search_text: lifesteal item, sustain item, hp sustain, lane sustain, physical lifesteal, heal on hit, hp regen from attack, damage lifesteal, carry sustain, early lifesteal, Morbid Mask

display_text: Morbid Mask, Cost: 900: Provides only the Lifesteal passive with no additional attribute bonuses. A pure sustain item for heroes looking to stay healthy through trading or jungling.
search_text: morbid mask stats, lifesteal stats, sustain stats, no stats item, pure lifesteal, component item, Morbid Mask

display_text: Morbid Mask, Cost: 900: Enhances survivability in fights by converting physical attack damage into health. More effective on heroes with high base damage or attack speed to maximize the healing output.
search_text: team fight sustain, fight healing, attack lifesteal, survivability in fight, physical survivability, Morbid Mask

display_text: Morbid Mask, Cost: 900: Synergizes with heroes who rely on physical damage output for farming or fighting, accelerating jungle clear and enabling more aggressive lane trading.
search_text: farming sustain, jungle sustain, lifesteal farming, trading sustain, physical carry, sustain build, Morbid Mask
